page_metadata.biotools__summary: Comprehensive software package to study the subclonal structures of tumor genomes, including subclonal cellular prevalences estimation, allelic configuration estimation, absolute copy number estimation and a few visualization tools.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Comprehensive software package to study the subclonal structures of tumor genomes, including subclonal cellular prevalences estimation, allelic configuration estimation, absolute copy number estimation and a few visualization tools.
